THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT EKSLER, ALLA GONZALEZ, HUVER PATINO DEFTS TO PAY PLAINTIFF $904.69 ON OR BEFORE JULY 12, 1993. IF DEFTS FAIL TO PAY BY SAID DATE, JUDGMENT FOR THE PLT. FOR REST. & POSS. OF 350 TURK ST, APT 1010 AND GARAGE SPACE G #51, S.F, CA. & DAMAGES OF $904.69, ATTORNY FEES, COST OF SUIT AND FORFEITURE OF LEASE.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT EKSLER, ALLA
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT EKSLER, ALLA GONZALEZ, HUVER PATINO
#2 JUDGE CHOPPELAS - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLT. CASE COMMENCED; DEFT'S WITNESS CALLED OUT OF ORDER. CONT. TO 6/30/93 AT 10AM.
CONT. COURT TRIAL; PLT. & DEFTS WITNESSES S/E; PLT. REST; DEFTS REST; EXHIBITS ADMITTED; PLT. WITNESS IN REBUTTAL EXAMINED; CONT. TO 7/1/93 10AM.
#2 JUDGE CHOPPELAS - CONT COURT TRIAL; REBUTTAL WITNESSES S/E; PLT. AND DEFTS CLOSING ARGUMENT; CASE SUBMITTED.
